name: openclaw-room
description: OpenClaw Room - 基于 OpenClaw 的多智能体协作项目管理系统

scripts.dev: concurrently -n backend,frontend -c blue,magenta "npm run dev -w @openclaw-room/backend" "npm run dev -w @openclaw-room/frontend"
scripts.build: npm run build -w @openclaw-room/backend && npm run build -w @openclaw-room/frontend
